issue.title: chore: add plugin directory to pnpm-workspace
issue.body: 将插件目录添加到pnpm-workspace以支持前端插件自定义依赖

comment.body:
我刚测试了这个，不加插件目录似乎是不行的

建议的通配符：`- apps/*/src/plugins/*`

但这不是一个好的方案，这会完全改变插件包导入行为

另外，由于使用 `catalog:` 协议，可能依然需要手动在`pnpm-workspace.yaml` 中添加依赖

如果是这样，不如总是要求手动添加插件依赖

issue.title: 使用zip安装api_key插件报错
issue.body:
使用zip安装api_key插件报错，使用git方式安装插件正常

下载api_key的zip包（https://github.com/fastapi-practices/api_key），页面安装zip插件报错如下：

  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\backend\app\admin\api\v1\sys\plugin.py", line 44, in install_plugin
    plugin_name = await plugin_service.install(type=type, file=file, repo_url=repo_url)
                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\backend\app\admin\service\plugin_service.py", line 54, in install
    return await install_zip_plugin(file)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\backend\plugin\installer.py", line 104, in install_zip_plugin
    await run_in_threadpool(zf.extractall, full_plugin_path, members)
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\.venv\Lib\site-packages\starlette\concurrency.py", line 32, in run_in_threadpool
    return await anyio.to_thread.run_sync(func)
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\.venv\Lib\site-packages\anyio\to_thread.py", line 63, in run_sync
    return await get_async_backend().run_sync_in_worker_thread(
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\.venv\Lib\site-packages\anyio\_backends\_asyncio.py", line 2502, in run_sync_in_worker_thread
    return await future
           ^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Test\fastapi_best_architecture\.venv\Lib\site-packages\anyio\_backends\_asyncio.py", line 986, in run
    result = context.run(func, *args)
             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "D:\Tools\Python312\Lib\zipfile\__init__.py", line 1721, in extractall
    self._extract_member(zipinfo, path, pwd)
  File "D:\Tools\Python312\Lib\zipfile\__init__.py", line 1762, in _extract_member
    raise ValueError("Empty filename.")
ValueError: Empty filename.
